records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are there so many stars up in the sky?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are there so many stars up in the sky?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are there so many stars up in the sky?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because people's wishes gather in the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because people's wishes gather in the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because people's wishes gather in the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And those wishes become twinkling stars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And those wishes become twinkling stars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And those wishes become twinkling stars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think my star is up there too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think my star is up there too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think my star is up there too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When a wish becomes too big, the star gets too heavy and falls down to the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When a wish becomes too big, the star gets too heavy and falls down to the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When a wish becomes too big, the star gets too heavy and falls down to the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's said that a fallen star will go find its wish's owner and make it come true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's said that a fallen star will go find its wish's owner and make it come true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's said that a fallen star will go find its wish's owner and make it come true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! That's incredible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! That's incredible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! That's incredible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you make a wish too, Mother? Did yours fall down to earth?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you make a wish too, Mother? Did yours fall down to earth?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you make a wish too, Mother? Did yours fall down to earth?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My star fell a long time ago and made my wish come true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My star fell a long time ago and made my wish come true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My star fell a long time ago and made my wish come true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when I asked what that wish was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when I asked what that wish was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when I asked what that wish was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother silently smiled and hugged me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother silently smiled and hugged me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother silently smiled and hugged me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the time, I didn't understand what that meant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the time, I didn't understand what that meant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the time, I didn't understand what that meant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought that it was warm and loving in Mother's embrace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought that it was warm and loving in Mother's embrace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought that it was warm and loving in Mother's embrace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I started running... toward where the star was twinkling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I started running... toward where the star was twinkling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I started running... toward where the star was twinkling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With my eyes locked at the sky, I ran through the thicket.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With my eyes locked at the sky, I ran through the thicket.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With my eyes locked at the sky, I ran through the thicket.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought to myself...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought to myself...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought to myself...

records.m_Talk_ENG: that the answer I was looking for could be where that light had fallen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: that the answer I was looking for could be where that light had fallen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: that the answer I was looking for could be where that light had fallen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A graveyard?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A graveyard?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A graveyard?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It is where the courageous comrades of the Administration are laid to rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It is where the courageous comrades of the Administration are laid to rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It is where the courageous comrades of the Administration are laid to rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the resting place for the heroes who have sacrificed their lives to protect our world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the resting place for the heroes who have sacrificed their lives to protect our world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the resting place for the heroes who have sacrificed their lives to protect our world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are so many... Did you make all of them, Mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are so many... Did you make all of them, Mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are so many... Did you make all of them, Mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had a lot of time on my hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had a lot of time on my hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had a lot of time on my hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough to bury and mourn them, and even reminisce about the times I had with them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough to bury and mourn them, and even reminisce about the times I had with them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough to bury and mourn them, and even reminisce about the times I had with them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happens to people when they die?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happens to people when they die?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happens to people when they die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They fall into an eternal slumber, and live on in the memories of those left behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They fall into an eternal slumber, and live on in the memories of those left behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They fall into an eternal slumber, and live on in the memories of those left behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's sad that we won't be able to ever meet them again, but... sadness is not all of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's sad that we won't be able to ever meet them again, but... sadness is not all of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's sad that we won't be able to ever meet them again, but... sadness is not all of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we tried our best until the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we tried our best until the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we tried our best until the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still believing that the fate we chose will bring hope to the future...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still believing that the fate we chose will bring hope to the future...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still believing that the fate we chose will bring hope to the future...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Administration still holds on to that hope, still fighting for the future, somewhere in the night sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Administration still holds on to that hope, still fighting for the future, somewhere in the night sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Administration still holds on to that hope, still fighting for the future, somewhere in the night sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The heroes of the Administration are really amazing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The heroes of the Administration are really amazing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The heroes of the Administration are really amazing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after all their efforts... it's a shame that those resting in their graves won't be able to see that future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after all their efforts... it's a shame that those resting in their graves won't be able to see that future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after all their efforts... it's a shame that those resting in their graves won't be able to see that future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It is. But at least it won't be meaningless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It is. But at least it won't be meaningless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It is. But at least it won't be meaningless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we will live on into the future and remember all of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we will live on into the future and remember all of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we will live on into the future and remember all of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll remember the sacrifices they made in the past.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll remember the sacrifices they made in the past.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll remember the sacrifices they made in the past.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I finally caught up with you... Why you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I finally caught up with you... Why you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I finally caught up with you... Why you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know how many joints I had to snap to escape your vines?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know how many joints I had to snap to escape your vines?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know how many joints I had to snap to escape your vines?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those weapons... they're all the Administration's...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those weapons... they're all the Administration's...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those weapons... they're all the Administration's...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each and every one of them... have names and words engraved on them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each and every one of them... have names and words engraved on them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each and every one of them... have names and words engraved on them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I was in Mother's womb...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I was in Mother's womb...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I was in Mother's womb...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother made all these tombs remembering the heroes of the Administration who passed away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother made all these tombs remembering the heroes of the Administration who passed away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother made all these tombs remembering the heroes of the Administration who passed away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would've taken... much longer than my entire life to make them all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would've taken... much longer than my entire life to make them all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would've taken... much longer than my entire life to make them all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin made... all these gravestones by herself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin made... all these gravestones by herself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin made... all these gravestones by herself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you know. The time it takes for a baby to be born is shorter than waiting for one's birthday to come around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you know. The time it takes for a baby to be born is shorter than waiting for one's birthday to come around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you know. The time it takes for a baby to be born is shorter than waiting for one's birthday to come around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that weird? It means that Mother spent all this time alone while she had me in her womb.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that weird? It means that Mother spent all this time alone while she had me in her womb.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that weird? It means that Mother spent all this time alone while she had me in her womb.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother told me that the Administration came and saved Mother when the world was in flames.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother told me that the Administration came and saved Mother when the world was in flames.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother told me that the Administration came and saved Mother when the world was in flames.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That day, Mother lost all her family, and we were the only ones left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That day, Mother lost all her family, and we were the only ones left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That day, Mother lost all her family, and we were the only ones left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother fought alongside the Administration for a future in which I would be born...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother fought alongside the Administration for a future in which I would be born...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother fought alongside the Administration for a future in which I would be born...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were able to come this far thanks to everyone's efforts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were able to come this far thanks to everyone's efforts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were able to come this far thanks to everyone's efforts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the memory of the day she parted ways with the Administration, Mother said something strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the memory of the day she parted ways with the Administration, Mother said something strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the memory of the day she parted ways with the Administration, Mother said something strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That I wouldn't be born.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That I wouldn't be born.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That I wouldn't be born.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the moment a world is destroyed, the flow of time no longer exists.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the moment a world is destroyed, the flow of time no longer exists.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the moment a world is destroyed, the flow of time no longer exists.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And without time, your future of being born is also non-existent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And without time, your future of being born is also non-existent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And without time, your future of being born is also non-existent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That makes no sense...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That makes no sense...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That makes no sense...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm right here, Parry! Can't you feel the warmth of my hand?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm right here, Parry! Can't you feel the warmth of my hand?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm right here, Parry! Can't you feel the warmth of my hand?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I exist right here! And all my happy memories with Mother are real!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I exist right here! And all my happy memories with Mother are real!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I exist right here! And all my happy memories with Mother are real!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They aren't fake!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They aren't fake!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They aren't fake!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother said she was sorry to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother said she was sorry to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother said she was sorry to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was sad... like we'd never see each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was sad... like we'd never see each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was sad... like we'd never see each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This garden is the only place that is isolated from a world on the brink of destruction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This garden is the only place that is isolated from a world on the brink of destruction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This garden is the only place that is isolated from a world on the brink of destruction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin made this little world by gathering all the possibilities that were left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin made this little world by gathering all the possibilities that were left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin made this little world by gathering all the possibilities that were left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Possibilities are bound to be lost due to change, but because time stands still there, it was a place where eternal safety was guaranteed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Possibilities are bound to be lost due to change, but because time stands still there, it was a place where eternal safety was guaranteed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Possibilities are bound to be lost due to change, but because time stands still there, it was a place where eternal safety was guaranteed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin said that she'd wait for us in a world where time froze.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin said that she'd wait for us in a world where time froze.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin said that she'd wait for us in a world where time froze.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That... must have been a long wait, with no guarantee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That... must have been a long wait, with no guarantee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That... must have been a long wait, with no guarantee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was her last mission...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was her last mission...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was her last mission...

records.m_Talk_ENG: to protect her master's memory while waiting forever for someone who may never come... while trapped in a bird cage where nothing changes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: to protect her master's memory while waiting forever for someone who may never come... while trapped in a bird cage where nothing changes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: to protect her master's memory while waiting forever for someone who may never come... while trapped in a bird cage where nothing changes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why couldn't... Mother leave with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why couldn't... Mother leave with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why couldn't... Mother leave with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin was the Antagonist. Her fate was bound to the world since birth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin was the Antagonist. Her fate was bound to the world since birth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin was the Antagonist. Her fate was bound to the world since birth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this garden only stops Pavlin's fate from coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this garden only stops Pavlin's fate from coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this garden only stops Pavlin's fate from coming to an end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we miraculously returned one day, it still would be impossible for her to leave with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we miraculously returned one day, it still would be impossible for her to leave with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we miraculously returned one day, it still would be impossible for her to leave with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then Mother... had to live a lifetime in a place where time didn't even exist?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then Mother... had to live a lifetime in a place where time didn't even exist?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then Mother... had to live a lifetime in a place where time didn't even exist?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To live an eternity without death with her unborn child who has no future...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To live an eternity without death with her unborn child who has no future...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To live an eternity without death with her unborn child who has no future...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't even fathom how much worse that would be than death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't even fathom how much worse that would be than death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't even fathom how much worse that would be than death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would've been... another loop of /"today/".
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would've been... another loop of /"today/".
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would've been... another loop of /"today/".

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, a change started to happen in this small world where time has stopped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, a change started to happen in this small world where time has stopped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, a change started to happen in this small world where time has stopped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grass grew, and flowers bloomed in the cold barren lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grass grew, and flowers bloomed in the cold barren lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grass grew, and flowers bloomed in the cold barren lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the flow of time, the fate of all things began to move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the flow of time, the fate of all things began to move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the flow of time, the fate of all things began to move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin broke the eternal wait, and chose change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin broke the eternal wait, and chose change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin broke the eternal wait, and chose change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, a child was born in her world that didn't have a future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, a child was born in her world that didn't have a future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, a child was born in her world that didn't have a future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a mother, Pavlin wanted her child to grow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a mother, Pavlin wanted her child to grow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a mother, Pavlin wanted her child to grow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She wanted to give her a name and have a future together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She wanted to give her a name and have a future together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She wanted to give her a name and have a future together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because her child, the one who didn't belong to any world with no fate of ever being born... was her everything, and her most precious treasure of all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because her child, the one who didn't belong to any world with no fate of ever being born... was her everything, and her most precious treasure of all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because her child, the one who didn't belong to any world with no fate of ever being born... was her everything, and her most precious treasure of all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... she knew that the happiness couldn't last forever, unlike the eternal wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... she knew that the happiness couldn't last forever, unlike the eternal wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... she knew that the happiness couldn't last forever, unlike the eternal wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because possibilities are bound to be lost along with change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because possibilities are bound to be lost along with change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because possibilities are bound to be lost along with change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The flow of time gave the two a miracle called tomorrow, while simultaneously slowly consuming all of the world's possibilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The flow of time gave the two a miracle called tomorrow, while simultaneously slowly consuming all of the world's possibilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The flow of time gave the two a miracle called tomorrow, while simultaneously slowly consuming all of the world's possibilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it reached its limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it reached its limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it reached its limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption began to seep into the world that lost possibilities, and with it, C.O.s started to appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption began to seep into the world that lost possibilities, and with it, C.O.s started to appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption began to seep into the world that lost possibilities, and with it, C.O.s started to appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If what you say is true, Parry, are you saying that Mother gave up her eternal safety to raise me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If what you say is true, Parry, are you saying that Mother gave up her eternal safety to raise me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If what you say is true, Parry, are you saying that Mother gave up her eternal safety to raise me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't understand! Why...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't understand! Why...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't understand! Why...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
She knew this would happen... but why did Mother choose to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
She knew this would happen... but why did Mother choose to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
She knew this would happen... but why did Mother choose to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From what I've learned living all these years is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: From what I've learned living all these years is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: From what I've learned living all these years is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: that no matter how wise someone is, they don't always base their decision on practicality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: that no matter how wise someone is, they don't always base their decision on practicality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: that no matter how wise someone is, they don't always base their decision on practicality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin just... wanted to show her child a beautiful world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin just... wanted to show her child a beautiful world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin just... wanted to show her child a beautiful world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or at least that's what I think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or at least that's what I think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or at least that's what I think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother said that the heroes of the Administration will save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother said that the heroes of the Administration will save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother said that the heroes of the Administration will save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know what saving the world meant at the time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know what saving the world meant at the time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know what saving the world meant at the time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the world I lived in... the Administration, the heroes... they all seemed like stories as distant as the stars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the world I lived in... the Administration, the heroes... they all seemed like stories as distant as the stars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the world I lived in... the Administration, the heroes... they all seemed like stories as distant as the stars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... I think I understand a little bit now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... I think I understand a little bit now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... I think I understand a little bit now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of what it feels... to lose one's world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of what it feels... to lose one's world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of what it feels... to lose one's world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where you're from... people are still fighting to not lose their world, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where you're from... people are still fighting to not lose their world, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where you're from... people are still fighting to not lose their world, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though not everyone has great aspirations to protect the world... they all do their best every day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though not everyone has great aspirations to protect the world... they all do their best every day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though not everyone has great aspirations to protect the world... they all do their best every day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At times, there are annoyingly difficult days, and in others, we might get frustrated in the face of a crisis, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At times, there are annoyingly difficult days, and in others, we might get frustrated in the face of a crisis, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At times, there are annoyingly difficult days, and in others, we might get frustrated in the face of a crisis, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each person works hard to protect their own little worlds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each person works hard to protect their own little worlds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each person works hard to protect their own little worlds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will also work hard to do so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will also work hard to do so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will also work hard to do so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I don't want their efforts for a better future to be in vain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I don't want their efforts for a better future to be in vain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I don't want their efforts for a better future to be in vain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go back and get ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go back and get ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go back and get ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to get the treasure back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to get the treasure back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to get the treasure back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are there so many stars up in the sky?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are there so many stars up in the sky?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are there so many stars up in the sky?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because people's wishes gather in the sky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because people's wishes gather in the sky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because people's wishes gather in the sky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And those wishes become twinkling stars.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And those wishes become twinkling stars.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And those wishes become twinkling stars.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think my star is up there too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think my star is up there too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think my star is up there too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When a wish becomes too big, the star gets too heavy and falls down to the ground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When a wish becomes too big, the star gets too heavy and falls down to the ground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When a wish becomes too big, the star gets too heavy and falls down to the ground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's said that a fallen star will go find its wish's owner and make it come true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's said that a fallen star will go find its wish's owner and make it come true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's said that a fallen star will go find its wish's owner and make it come true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! That's incredible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! That's incredible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! That's incredible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you make a wish too, Mother? Did yours fall down to earth?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you make a wish too, Mother? Did yours fall down to earth?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you make a wish too, Mother? Did yours fall down to earth?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My star fell a long time ago and made my wish come true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My star fell a long time ago and made my wish come true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My star fell a long time ago and made my wish come true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And when I asked what that wish was...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And when I asked what that wish was...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And when I asked what that wish was...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother silently smiled and hugged me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother silently smiled and hugged me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother silently smiled and hugged me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the time, I didn't understand what that meant.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the time, I didn't understand what that meant.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the time, I didn't understand what that meant.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought that it was warm and loving in Mother's embrace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought that it was warm and loving in Mother's embrace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought that it was warm and loving in Mother's embrace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: I started running... toward where the star was twinkling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I started running... toward where the star was twinkling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I started running... toward where the star was twinkling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With my eyes locked at the sky, I ran through the thicket.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With my eyes locked at the sky, I ran through the thicket.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With my eyes locked at the sky, I ran through the thicket.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought to myself...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought to myself...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought to myself...

root.m_Talk_ENG: that the answer I was looking for could be where that light had fallen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: that the answer I was looking for could be where that light had fallen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: that the answer I was looking for could be where that light had fallen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A graveyard?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A graveyard?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A graveyard?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It is where the courageous comrades of the Administration are laid to rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It is where the courageous comrades of the Administration are laid to rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It is where the courageous comrades of the Administration are laid to rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the resting place for the heroes who have sacrificed their lives to protect our world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the resting place for the heroes who have sacrificed their lives to protect our world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the resting place for the heroes who have sacrificed their lives to protect our world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are so many... Did you make all of them, Mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are so many... Did you make all of them, Mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are so many... Did you make all of them, Mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had a lot of time on my hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had a lot of time on my hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had a lot of time on my hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough to bury and mourn them, and even reminisce about the times I had with them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough to bury and mourn them, and even reminisce about the times I had with them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough to bury and mourn them, and even reminisce about the times I had with them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What happens to people when they die?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What happens to people when they die?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What happens to people when they die?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They fall into an eternal slumber, and live on in the memories of those left behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They fall into an eternal slumber, and live on in the memories of those left behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They fall into an eternal slumber, and live on in the memories of those left behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's sad that we won't be able to ever meet them again, but... sadness is not all of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's sad that we won't be able to ever meet them again, but... sadness is not all of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's sad that we won't be able to ever meet them again, but... sadness is not all of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because we tried our best until the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because we tried our best until the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because we tried our best until the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still believing that the fate we chose will bring hope to the future...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still believing that the fate we chose will bring hope to the future...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still believing that the fate we chose will bring hope to the future...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Administration still holds on to that hope, still fighting for the future, somewhere in the night sky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Administration still holds on to that hope, still fighting for the future, somewhere in the night sky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Administration still holds on to that hope, still fighting for the future, somewhere in the night sky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The heroes of the Administration are really amazing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The heroes of the Administration are really amazing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The heroes of the Administration are really amazing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But after all their efforts... it's a shame that those resting in their graves won't be able to see that future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But after all their efforts... it's a shame that those resting in their graves won't be able to see that future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But after all their efforts... it's a shame that those resting in their graves won't be able to see that future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It is. But at least it won't be meaningless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It is. But at least it won't be meaningless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It is. But at least it won't be meaningless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because we will live on into the future and remember all of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because we will live on into the future and remember all of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because we will live on into the future and remember all of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll remember the sacrifices they made in the past.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll remember the sacrifices they made in the past.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll remember the sacrifices they made in the past.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: I finally caught up with you... Why you...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I finally caught up with you... Why you...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I finally caught up with you... Why you...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know how many joints I had to snap to escape your vines?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know how many joints I had to snap to escape your vines?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know how many joints I had to snap to escape your vines?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those weapons... they're all the Administration's...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those weapons... they're all the Administration's...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those weapons... they're all the Administration's...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each and every one of them... have names and words engraved on them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each and every one of them... have names and words engraved on them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each and every one of them... have names and words engraved on them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I was in Mother's womb...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I was in Mother's womb...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I was in Mother's womb...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother made all these tombs remembering the heroes of the Administration who passed away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother made all these tombs remembering the heroes of the Administration who passed away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother made all these tombs remembering the heroes of the Administration who passed away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would've taken... much longer than my entire life to make them all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would've taken... much longer than my entire life to make them all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would've taken... much longer than my entire life to make them all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin made... all these gravestones by herself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin made... all these gravestones by herself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin made... all these gravestones by herself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you know. The time it takes for a baby to be born is shorter than waiting for one's birthday to come around.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you know. The time it takes for a baby to be born is shorter than waiting for one's birthday to come around.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you know. The time it takes for a baby to be born is shorter than waiting for one's birthday to come around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that weird? It means that Mother spent all this time alone while she had me in her womb.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that weird? It means that Mother spent all this time alone while she had me in her womb.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that weird? It means that Mother spent all this time alone while she had me in her womb.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother told me that the Administration came and saved Mother when the world was in flames.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother told me that the Administration came and saved Mother when the world was in flames.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother told me that the Administration came and saved Mother when the world was in flames.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That day, Mother lost all her family, and we were the only ones left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That day, Mother lost all her family, and we were the only ones left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That day, Mother lost all her family, and we were the only ones left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother fought alongside the Administration for a future in which I would be born...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother fought alongside the Administration for a future in which I would be born...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother fought alongside the Administration for a future in which I would be born...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We were able to come this far thanks to everyone's efforts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We were able to come this far thanks to everyone's efforts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We were able to come this far thanks to everyone's efforts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the memory of the day she parted ways with the Administration, Mother said something strange.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the memory of the day she parted ways with the Administration, Mother said something strange.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the memory of the day she parted ways with the Administration, Mother said something strange.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That I wouldn't be born.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That I wouldn't be born.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That I wouldn't be born.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From the moment a world is destroyed, the flow of time no longer exists.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From the moment a world is destroyed, the flow of time no longer exists.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From the moment a world is destroyed, the flow of time no longer exists.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And without time, your future of being born is also non-existent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And without time, your future of being born is also non-existent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And without time, your future of being born is also non-existent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That makes no sense...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That makes no sense...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That makes no sense...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm right here, Parry! Can't you feel the warmth of my hand?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm right here, Parry! Can't you feel the warmth of my hand?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm right here, Parry! Can't you feel the warmth of my hand?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I exist right here! And all my happy memories with Mother are real!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I exist right here! And all my happy memories with Mother are real!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I exist right here! And all my happy memories with Mother are real!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They aren't fake!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They aren't fake!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They aren't fake!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother said she was sorry to me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother said she was sorry to me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother said she was sorry to me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She was sad... like we'd never see each other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She was sad... like we'd never see each other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She was sad... like we'd never see each other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This garden is the only place that is isolated from a world on the brink of destruction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This garden is the only place that is isolated from a world on the brink of destruction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This garden is the only place that is isolated from a world on the brink of destruction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin made this little world by gathering all the possibilities that were left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin made this little world by gathering all the possibilities that were left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin made this little world by gathering all the possibilities that were left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Possibilities are bound to be lost due to change, but because time stands still there, it was a place where eternal safety was guaranteed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Possibilities are bound to be lost due to change, but because time stands still there, it was a place where eternal safety was guaranteed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Possibilities are bound to be lost due to change, but because time stands still there, it was a place where eternal safety was guaranteed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin said that she'd wait for us in a world where time froze.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin said that she'd wait for us in a world where time froze.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin said that she'd wait for us in a world where time froze.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That... must have been a long wait, with no guarantee.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That... must have been a long wait, with no guarantee.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That... must have been a long wait, with no guarantee.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was her last mission...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was her last mission...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was her last mission...

root.m_Talk_ENG: to protect her master's memory while waiting forever for someone who may never come... while trapped in a bird cage where nothing changes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: to protect her master's memory while waiting forever for someone who may never come... while trapped in a bird cage where nothing changes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: to protect her master's memory while waiting forever for someone who may never come... while trapped in a bird cage where nothing changes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why couldn't... Mother leave with you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why couldn't... Mother leave with you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why couldn't... Mother leave with you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin was the Antagonist. Her fate was bound to the world since birth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin was the Antagonist. Her fate was bound to the world since birth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin was the Antagonist. Her fate was bound to the world since birth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this garden only stops Pavlin's fate from coming to an end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this garden only stops Pavlin's fate from coming to an end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this garden only stops Pavlin's fate from coming to an end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we miraculously returned one day, it still would be impossible for her to leave with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we miraculously returned one day, it still would be impossible for her to leave with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we miraculously returned one day, it still would be impossible for her to leave with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then Mother... had to live a lifetime in a place where time didn't even exist?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then Mother... had to live a lifetime in a place where time didn't even exist?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then Mother... had to live a lifetime in a place where time didn't even exist?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To live an eternity without death with her unborn child who has no future...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To live an eternity without death with her unborn child who has no future...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To live an eternity without death with her unborn child who has no future...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't even fathom how much worse that would be than death.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't even fathom how much worse that would be than death.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't even fathom how much worse that would be than death.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would've been... another loop of /"today/".
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would've been... another loop of /"today/".
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would've been... another loop of /"today/".

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, a change started to happen in this small world where time has stopped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, a change started to happen in this small world where time has stopped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, a change started to happen in this small world where time has stopped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grass grew, and flowers bloomed in the cold barren lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grass grew, and flowers bloomed in the cold barren lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grass grew, and flowers bloomed in the cold barren lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the flow of time, the fate of all things began to move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the flow of time, the fate of all things began to move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the flow of time, the fate of all things began to move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin broke the eternal wait, and chose change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin broke the eternal wait, and chose change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin broke the eternal wait, and chose change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, a child was born in her world that didn't have a future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, a child was born in her world that didn't have a future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, a child was born in her world that didn't have a future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a mother, Pavlin wanted her child to grow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a mother, Pavlin wanted her child to grow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a mother, Pavlin wanted her child to grow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She wanted to give her a name and have a future together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She wanted to give her a name and have a future together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She wanted to give her a name and have a future together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because her child, the one who didn't belong to any world with no fate of ever being born... was her everything, and her most precious treasure of all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because her child, the one who didn't belong to any world with no fate of ever being born... was her everything, and her most precious treasure of all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because her child, the one who didn't belong to any world with no fate of ever being born... was her everything, and her most precious treasure of all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... she knew that the happiness couldn't last forever, unlike the eternal wait.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... she knew that the happiness couldn't last forever, unlike the eternal wait.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... she knew that the happiness couldn't last forever, unlike the eternal wait.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because possibilities are bound to be lost along with change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because possibilities are bound to be lost along with change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because possibilities are bound to be lost along with change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The flow of time gave the two a miracle called tomorrow, while simultaneously slowly consuming all of the world's possibilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The flow of time gave the two a miracle called tomorrow, while simultaneously slowly consuming all of the world's possibilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The flow of time gave the two a miracle called tomorrow, while simultaneously slowly consuming all of the world's possibilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it reached its limit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it reached its limit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it reached its limit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption began to seep into the world that lost possibilities, and with it, C.O.s started to appear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption began to seep into the world that lost possibilities, and with it, C.O.s started to appear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption began to seep into the world that lost possibilities, and with it, C.O.s started to appear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If what you say is true, Parry, are you saying that Mother gave up her eternal safety to raise me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If what you say is true, Parry, are you saying that Mother gave up her eternal safety to raise me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If what you say is true, Parry, are you saying that Mother gave up her eternal safety to raise me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't understand! Why...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't understand! Why...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't understand! Why...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
She knew this would happen... but why did Mother choose to
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
She knew this would happen... but why did Mother choose to
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
She knew this would happen... but why did Mother choose to
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From what I've learned living all these years is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: From what I've learned living all these years is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: From what I've learned living all these years is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: that no matter how wise someone is, they don't always base their decision on practicality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: that no matter how wise someone is, they don't always base their decision on practicality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: that no matter how wise someone is, they don't always base their decision on practicality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin just... wanted to show her child a beautiful world...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin just... wanted to show her child a beautiful world...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin just... wanted to show her child a beautiful world...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or at least that's what I think.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or at least that's what I think.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or at least that's what I think.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother said that the heroes of the Administration will save the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother said that the heroes of the Administration will save the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother said that the heroes of the Administration will save the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know what saving the world meant at the time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know what saving the world meant at the time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know what saving the world meant at the time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the world I lived in... the Administration, the heroes... they all seemed like stories as distant as the stars.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the world I lived in... the Administration, the heroes... they all seemed like stories as distant as the stars.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the world I lived in... the Administration, the heroes... they all seemed like stories as distant as the stars.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... I think I understand a little bit now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... I think I understand a little bit now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... I think I understand a little bit now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of what it feels... to lose one's world...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of what it feels... to lose one's world...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of what it feels... to lose one's world...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where you're from... people are still fighting to not lose their world, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where you're from... people are still fighting to not lose their world, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where you're from... people are still fighting to not lose their world, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though not everyone has great aspirations to protect the world... they all do their best every day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though not everyone has great aspirations to protect the world... they all do their best every day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though not everyone has great aspirations to protect the world... they all do their best every day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At times, there are annoyingly difficult days, and in others, we might get frustrated in the face of a crisis, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: At times, there are annoyingly difficult days, and in others, we might get frustrated in the face of a crisis, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: At times, there are annoyingly difficult days, and in others, we might get frustrated in the face of a crisis, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each person works hard to protect their own little worlds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each person works hard to protect their own little worlds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each person works hard to protect their own little worlds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will also work hard to do so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will also work hard to do so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will also work hard to do so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I don't want their efforts for a better future to be in vain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I don't want their efforts for a better future to be in vain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I don't want their efforts for a better future to be in vain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go back and get ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go back and get ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go back and get ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have to get the treasure back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have to get the treasure back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have to get the treasure back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go.
